name: sandblast-backend
description: Sandblast backend package with Marion conversational layering refinements and isolated Sandblast TV scheduler integration

scripts.verify: npm run lint:syntax && npm run test:marion-layering && npm run verify:sandblast-tv
scripts.dev: node --check index.js && npm run lint:sandblast-tv && node index.js
scripts.lint:sandblast-tv: node --check SandblastTV/index.js && node --check SandblastTV/routes.js && node --check SandblastTV/manifestStore.js && node --check SandblastTV/schedulerService.js && node --check SandblastTV/mediaValidator.js && node --check SandblastTV/widgetBridge.js
scripts.verify:sandblast-tv: npm run lint:sandblast-tv && npm run test:sandblast-tv
